hooks.command: git fetch origin develop 2>/dev/null && echo 'Synced with origin/develop' || echo 'Could not fetch origin/develop (offline?)'

INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '/migrations/[0-9]'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOQUEADO: No se pueden modificar migraciones existentes de Django. Las migraciones son registros inmutables."}}'; else exit 0; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(env|pem|key)$|credentials\.json|secrets\.'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOQUEADO: No se pueden editar archivos con secretos o credenciales."}}'; else exit 0; fi

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'npm install.*(\@mui|\.@chakra|\@mantine|antd|bootstrap|react-bootstrap|\@material)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOQUEADO: Este proyecto usa shadcn/ui + Radix UI exclusivamente. No instalar otras librerias de UI. Usa: npx shadcn@latest add {component}"}}'; else exit 0; fi

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git push.*(origin\s+(main|master|develop)\b|--force)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOQUEADO: No se permite push directo a branches protegidos. Usa PR: feature/* o fix/* -> develop -> main."}}'; else exit 0; fi

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git commit'; then MSG=$(echo "$CMD" | grep -oP '(?<=-m ["'\'']).+?(?=["'\''](\s|$))' || echo ''); if [ -n "$MSG" ] && ! echo "$MSG" | grep -qE '^(feat|fix|refactor|docs|ci|chore|test|style|perf)(\(.+\))?!?:'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOQUEADO: El commit debe usar conventional commits. Formato: tipo(scope): descripcion. Tipos: feat, fix, refactor, docs, ci, chore, test, style, perf"}}'; else exit 0; fi; else exit 0; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.py$' && echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'backend/'; then ruff check --fix "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null && echo 'Ruff auto-fix applied' || true; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.tsx$' && echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'frontend/src/'; then if grep -qE '(useState|useEffect|useRef|useCallback|onClick|onChange|onSubmit|useContext)' "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null && ! head -5 "$FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'use client' 2>/dev/null; then echo 'ADVERTENCIA: '"$FILE_PATH"' usa hooks/eventos de React pero NO tiene use client al inicio.'; fi; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'backend/.*/models\.py$'; then if grep -qE '^class\s+\w+.*models\.Model\)' "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null && ! grep -q 'TenantAwareModel' "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then echo 'ALERTA TENANT: '"$FILE_PATH"' tiene modelos que heredan de models.Model en vez de TenantAwareModel.'; fi; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.py$' && echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'backend/'; then ISSUES=''; if grep -nE '\.objects\.all\(\)' "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null | grep -vE '#.*noqa|#.*tenant-safe' > /tmp/tenant_check 2>/dev/null && [ -s /tmp/tenant_check ]; then ISSUES="$ISSUES$(echo 'objects.all() sin filtro de tenant encontrado:'; cat /tmp/tenant_check)"; fi; if grep -nE '(cursor\.execute|connection\.cursor|raw\()' "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null | grep -vE '#.*noqa' > /tmp/raw_sql_check 2>/dev/null && [ -s /tmp/raw_sql_check ]; then ISSUES="$ISSUES$(echo 'Raw SQL detectado (riesgo de inyeccion SQL y bypass de tenant):'; cat /tmp/raw_sql_check)"; fi; if grep -nE '\.extra\(' "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null | grep -vE '#.*noqa' > /tmp/extra_check 2>/dev/null && [ -s /tmp/extra_check ]; then ISSUES="$ISSUES$(echo 'QuerySet.extra() detectado (deprecado, riesgo de SQL injection):'; cat /tmp/extra_check)"; fi; if [ -n "$ISSUES" ]; then echo "$ISSUES"; fi; rm -f /tmp/tenant_check /tmp/raw_sql_check /tmp/extra_check; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.tsx$' && echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'frontend/'; then if grep -nE 'dangerouslySetInnerHTML' "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null > /tmp/xss_check && [ -s /tmp/xss_check ]; then echo 'ALERTA XSS: dangerouslySetInnerHTML detectado en '"$FILE_PATH"':'; cat /tmp/xss_check; echo 'Asegurate de sanitizar el HTML con DOMPurify u otra libreria antes de renderizar.'; fi; rm -f /tmp/xss_check; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.tsx$' && echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'frontend/src/'; then echo 'DESIGN CHECK: Verifica que '"$FILE_PATH"' cumple: (1) shadcn/ui components (2) TailwindCSS only (3) mobile-first responsive (4) aria labels en elementos interactivos. Skills: .claude/skills/web-design-guidelines/ y .claude/skills/shadcn/'; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.tsx$' && echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'frontend/src/'; then echo 'DESIGN REVIEW: Archivo nuevo '"$FILE_PATH"'. Verifica: (1) shadcn/ui + Radix UI (2) TailwindCSS 4 only (3) Server Component by default (4) mobile-first (sm: md: lg:) (5) Accesibilidad (aria, alt, semantic HTML). Lee skills: web-design-guidelines, shadcn, vercel-react-best-practices.'; fi

echo 'RECORDATORIO POST-COMPACTACION: Este proyecto usa SDD (Spec-Driven Development). Branch flow: feature/* -> develop -> main. Conventional commits obligatorios. Skills: multi-tenancy, shadcn, vercel-react, web-design-guidelines, code-quality, frontend-design. Agents: backend-implementer, frontend-implementer, security-reviewer, test-runner.'

CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | head -20); if [ -n "$CHANGED" ]; then echo 'Cambios pendientes detectados. Considera guardar progreso en Engram si esta sesion tiene trabajo importante sin commit.'; fi
echo 'Worktree creado. RECORDATORIO: (1) Al terminar, limpia el worktree. (2) Cada worktree debe tener su propio feature branch. (3) No olvides git fetch origin develop antes de crear el branch.'
